auction.listing: There are currently no auctions available to display.
auction.store: There are currently no auction stores to display.

direct.listing: There are currently no listings available in the market.

auction.title: Auction House (C2C)
auction.desc: Only items listed in auction mode are displayed; you can place a bid or buy outright. For other items, please visit the player market.
auction.createBuyTitle: The auction page does not support creating purchase orders, please switch to the player market.

direct.title: Player Market (C2C)
direct.desc: Items listed by players themselves. Sales orders need to be created within the game; purchase orders can be posted directly on the website.

initMeta.exchangeRateHint: Waiting for the exchange rate to load
initMeta.leaderboardView: Waiting for the leaderboard to load

templates.rechargeNoOrder: No recharge order to check yet.
templates.rechargeCreated: Order {orderId} created. Complete payment, then check status.
templates.rechargePaidDetected: Payment confirmed for order {orderId}. Credited {coinAmount} ShopCoin.
templates.rechargeNoPayLink: Payment provider did not return a payment link.
templates.postOrderWalletRefreshFailed: Wallet refresh failed after order creation: {message}
templates.postOrderOrdersLoadFailed: Order reload failed after order creation: {message}
templates.postOrderProductsRefreshFailed: Product refresh failed after order creation: {message}
templates.postBuyOrderWalletRefreshFailed: Wallet refresh failed after buy-order publish: {message}
templates.marketActionInvalidListingId: Market operation failed: invalid listing ID.

page.title: WebShopX - Minecraft Web Shop
page.authProfileDesc: Authentication complete. You can now access your wallet, official shop, and player market.
page.authTipLine2: Then sign in here with your Minecraft username and that password.
page.authPasswordTipLine1: If you have not set a web password yet, run /webshopx password <new_password> in game first.
page.leaderboardDesc: Sort by assets or online time, and locate your rank with live online status.
page.logsTipLine1: If something goes wrong, check logs first and share them with admins or developers when needed.
page.productCropDesc: Drag to move, use wheel/slider to zoom, and pinch on mobile. Then click Apply and Upload.
page.authFunctionsDesc: Authentication complete. You can now access your wallet, official shop, and player market.
page.walletDesc: Web Coin is WebShopX-specific, while Game Coin usually comes from in-game economy.
page.rechargeDesc: Create a payment order and credit ShopCoin after payment confirmation.
page.rechargeComboUnavailableTip: This payment method and currency combination is not available. Please change your selection.
page.rechargePaymentDialogDesc: Scan the QR code on mobile or open the payment page.
page.rechargePaymentNoQr: No QR code was returned for this payment method.
page.rechargePaymentExpiredQr: This order has expired. Please close this dialog and create a new payment order.
page.redeemDesc: Enter an admin-issued code to credit your wallet instantly.
page.redeemTipLine1: Redeem codes are usually one-time use. Do not expose them publicly.
page.exchangeDesc: Convert between Web Coin and Game Coin with server-defined rates.
page.walletLedgerDesc: Shows recent web wallet records only, excluding direct external Vault changes.
page.shopDesc: Server-maintained products, ready for direct purchase.
page.ordersDesc: View your personal purchases and refunds.
page.notificationsDesc: Track market changes, delivery reminders, and system announcements.
page.marketSectionDesc: Use /webshopx market in game to open GUI; pricing and remarks stay manageable on web.

autoPhrase.p0575: )) { state.boundUuid = payload.boundUuid || null; } applyUserVisualPermission(user.visualPermission || payload.visualPermission || {}); //Save session to local storage const sessionData = { token: state.token, username: state.username, boundUuid: state.boundUuid, }; window.localStorage.setItem(SESSION_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(sessionData)); updateAuthLayout(); state.hasLoadedOrders = false; state.hasLoadedNotifications = false; startRealtimeSync(); refreshNotificationUnreadCount().catch(() => { // ignore unread refresh errors, realtime loop will retry }); } function clearSession() { state.token = null; state.username = null; state.boundUuid = null; state.orders = []; state.notifications = []; state.hasLoadedOrders = false; state.hasLoadedNotifications = false; state.unreadNotificationCount = 0; state.visualPermission = { customIconAllowed: true, customNameAllowed: true, customUploadAllowed: true, }; //Remove locally stored session window.localStorage.removeItem(SESSION_STORAGE_KEY); renderOrders(state.orders); renderNotifications(state.notifications); renderWalletLedger([]); updateAuthLayout(); stopRealtimeSync(); } async function restoreSession() { try { const saved = window.localStorage.getItem(SESSION_STORAGE_KEY); if (!saved) { return; } const sessionData = JSON.parse(saved); if (!sessionData.token) { return; } //Temporarily set token for verification const originalToken = state.token; state.token = sessionData.token; //Try to refresh the wallet to verify the token await refreshWallet(); // If successful, resume full session state.username = sessionData.username; state.boundUuid = sessionData.boundUuid; updateAuthLayout(); await loadOrders(); await refreshNotificationUnreadCount(); startRealtimeSync(); log(

market_create.buy_requires_fixed_price: Purchase orders do not support dynamic pricing or auctions.
market_create.invalid_quantity: The quantity must be between 1 and 64.
market_create.invalid_tag: The category tag is invalid or not allowed.
market_create.tag_disabled: This category label has been disabled.
market_create.limitation_item_forbidden: The current item does not meet the listing rules.
market_create.limitation_currency_not_allowed: This currency is not allowed for the current listing.
market_create.limitation_trade_mode_not_allowed: This transaction model is not allowed for the current listing.
market_create.limitation_side_not_allowed: The shelving direction does not allow the current operation to be performed.

notifications_load.not_found: The notification interface is unavailable, please try again later.

notifications_mark_read.bad_request: The notification parameters are incorrect. Please refresh and try again.
notifications_mark_read.not_found: The notification does not exist or has been deleted.

SUCCESS.text: Redemption successful, the assets have been credited.

INVALID_CODE.text: Redemption failed: The redemption code is invalid.

EXPIRED.text: Redemption failed: The redemption code has expired.

OUT_OF_STOCK.text: Redemption failed: The redemption code has all been claimed.

ALREADY_USED.text: Redemption failed: You have already used this redemption code.

USER_LIMIT_REACHED.text: Redemption failed: You have reached the personal usage limit for this code.

result.success_desc: Your order has been paid successfully! Thank you.
result.cancel_desc: You have cancelled the checkout process. You can place a new order anytime.
result.error_desc: An error occurred while processing your payment. Please contact support.
